description_long: This sculpture depicts a dramatic crucifixion scene, with a central figure on a cross elevated above a rocky base. Flanking the cross are two robed figures, each standing on either side, their postures suggesting mourning or contemplation. The base is textured to resemble rough stone, adding to the realism and gravity of the scene. The figures are intricately detailed, with visible folds in their garments and expressive facial features. The entire composition is mounted on a rectangular plinth, which provides stability and a sense of monumentality. The material appears to be weathered stone or concrete, giving the sculpture a somber, enduring presence.
description: A detailed stone crucifixion scene with three robed figures and a cross atop a rocky base, mounted on a rectangular plinth.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the crucified figure on the cross, flanked by two robed mourners, all atop a rocky base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sculpture, with the cross and figures in profile and the rocky texture of the base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the two robed figures and the cross, with the rocky base and plinth clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the figures and the verticality of the cross.
attribute_subject_matter: Crucifixion scene with three human figures and a cross
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
